hero.name: Chowdhury Azmain Faik
hero.bio: Detail-oriented and innovation-driven software professional bridging development and quality assurance to deliver reliable, scalable, high-performing applications.

about.bio1: I'm a Software QA Engineer with a strong background spanning manual testing, automation, cybersecurity, and full-stack development. Currently working at Inteliweave — an umbrella of AIDocBuilder Inc, Canada.
about.bio2: I aim to leverage my understanding of SDLC, testing methodologies, and modern development practices to contribute to building robust systems and collaborating with cross-functional teams.
about.bio3: Based in Mohakhali DOHS, Dhaka, Bangladesh.

experience.desc: Working as a QA Engineer within an AI-focused product team under AIDocBuilder Inc, Canada. Responsible for ensuring quality and reliability of AI-powered document processing systems through comprehensive test planning, execution, and defect management.

Worked in Solutions Architecture and Bid Management, providing technical consultancy, cybersecurity assessments, and system infrastructure solutions. Engaged in technical sales, cloud security, and virtualization services.

Started professional career as a Junior Software Engineer, contributing to IT department development efforts. Gained hands-on experience with software development practices, SDLC, and team collaboration.

projects.title: Daraz E-commerce Test Cases
projects.desc: Comprehensive test case suite for the Daraz e-commerce platform covering functional, regression, and edge case scenarios across key user journeys.

projects.title: Daraz E-commerce Mind Map
projects.desc: Visual mind map for Daraz's platform, structuring test coverage areas, modules, and testing strategies for efficient QA planning and documentation.
